targets.name: OpenVLA
targets.notes: 7B open-source generalist VLA trained on Open X-Embodiment episodes.

targets.name: pi-zero
targets.notes: Physical Intelligence open-weight model family with E2E and planner-guided workflows.

targets.name: Octo
targets.notes: Open-source generalist policy trained on Open X-Embodiment.

targets.name: SmolVLA
targets.notes: Smaller VLA family intended for efficient robot learning.

targets.name: TinyVLA
targets.notes: Lightweight VLA focused on fast, data-efficient performance.

targets.name: NORA / NORA-1.5
targets.notes: Open generalist embodied model family; NORA-1.5 uses a world model.

targets.name: BitVLA
targets.notes: 1-bit VLA model for efficient robotic manipulation.
